title: The Dummy Plug System
wikitext:
[]: The Dummy Plug System             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Aug 01, 2009 3:39 pm Who invented the DPS? If it's Ritsuko, isn't it counterproductive to give the blueprints to SEELE, so they can later on build them in the MP/2nd Generation EVAs?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:19 pm Ritsuko, probably. Also, how would they stop SEELE from getting those plans? Why would they? At the time SEELE began developing the MP Evas, there was really no reason to withhold that sort of information from them.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sun Aug 02, 2009 6:59 pm Weren't the MP EVAs designed in secret somehow? There's not many details given to us in either the TV series or EoE, and it seems that even NERV doesn't know very much about them, only sketchy details. Also, to add: The Dummy Plug System looks like one of those things where all you need to do is get the basic principles about right and then the other details flow from that point on. And don't forget: Kaji was a double (triple?) agent, spying on NERV for SEELE and SEELE for NERV. He'd have to have said something about the Dummy Plugs to someone. Even if he actually didn't, I wouldn't put it past him given that it's *really* important information that could lead to a significant raise or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:46 am Asuka definitely knew they were being made. I also think they mentioned in the series that production had started.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:57 pm Correct. I know Misato and Ritsuko talked about it at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Aug 03, 2009 7:06 pm So did Makoto and Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 7:32 pm I don't think there is any information regarding the ONE PERSON who started it.
